candidate_check.description: Windows 10 must be configured to enable Remote host allows delegation of non-exportable credentials.

check_content_excerpt:
This is NA for Windows 10 LTSC\B versions 1507 and 1607.

If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding.

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\CredentialsDelegation\

Value Name: AllowProtectedCreds

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000001 (1)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> System >> Credentials Delegation >> "Remote host allows delegation of non-exportable credentials" to "Enabled".
title: Windows 10 must be configured to enable Remote host allows delegation of non-exportable credentials.
